name: Pineapple Yogurt Freeze
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Spoon the mixture into 4 small dessert bowls and freeze.
3. To serve, let stand at room temperature for 10-20 minutes to soften, or microwave for 20 seconds to soften.
4. For frozen pops: Spoon the mixture into 6 fruit bar molds or 3-oz paper cups. Freeze until slightly firm, insert wooden sticks, then freeze until firm.
Makes 6 servings.
